parameters.content:
## APMG Campaign Send - setup

**1. Gmail credential** - open **Send Plain** and, under *Credential to connect with*, pick your own Gmail OAuth2 credential. (No credential ships with this import.)

**2. (Recommended) Secure the webhook** - on **Send Webhook** set *Authentication → Header Auth* with header name `x-apmg-secret`, then set the same header/value in the app so only it can trigger sends.

**3. Go live** - **Activate** the workflow, copy the **Production** URL (ends in `/webhook/campaign-send`) and set it in the app as `N8N_CAMPAIGN_WEBHOOK_URL`.

---
**Request body (POST):**
`{ "campaign": "outreach-2026", "messages": [ { "to", "leadId", "subject", "text", "attachment?": { "url", "filename" } } ] }`

`text` is plain-text; the Code node builds the branded HTML from it and renders any attachment as a downloadable PDF card via the `/t/` tracking link.

**Response:** `{ "ok": true, "sent": N }`
